code: import{OG_TO_USD_RATE}from"./constants";export const formatDate=ts=>new Date(ts*1000).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric",year:"numeric"});export const formatTime=ts=>new Date(ts*1000).toLocaleTimeString("en-US",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});export const shortAddr=a=>a?a.slice(0,6)+"..."+a.slice(-4):"";export const soldPct=(s,m)=>Math.min(100,Math.round(s/m*100));export const ogToUSD=og=>(parseFloat(og||0)*OG_TO_USD_RATE).toFixed(2);export const slugify=str=>str.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,"-").replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g,"");
